<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Enough information has been gathered to compile the comprehensive report.

Three host projects were identified: SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Program.cs, SchaerbeekMunicipality.AppHost/AppHost.cs, and SchaerbeekMunicipality.ServiceDefaults/Extensions.cs. No additional Program.cs files exist elsewhere.

Dependency injection is wired through AddInfrastructure in Infrastructure/DependencyInjection.cs. Handlers are registered manually in Program.cs rather than via MediatR. FluentValidation validators are loaded from assembly containing.

No ASP.NET Core Authentication or Authorization middleware is configured.

Authentication uses a custom demo pattern with an ICurrentOfficer scoped service. Role-based authorization classes exist per feature area, and a RoleSwitcher UI component supports role switching.

External services include the Post Aspire AppHost. No real HTTP external APIs are used. Outbound notifications are simulated and stored in the database. The OTLP exporter is optional via OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT. HEALTH_CHECK_API_KEY secures non-development health endpoints.

The infrastructure layer contains MunicipalDbContext with SQLite or Npgsql. Twelve repositories are present. LocalFileDocumentStorage handles file storage. DomainEventDispatcher routes events to multiple handlers per event type.

HtmlCertificateRenderer is also present.

Blazor pages consume handlers via @inject. Minimal API endpoints resolve handlers through method injection. Handlers themselves inject repository interfaces, guards, and ICurrentOfficer.
</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

## Host projects and startup

There is **one** `Program.cs` in the solution. Host-related entry points:

| Project | Path | Role |
|---------|------|------|
| **Web** | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Program.cs` | Main Blazor Server + Minimal API host |
| **AppHost** | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.AppHost/AppHost.cs` | .NET Aspire orchestrator (PostgreSQL + Web) |
| **ServiceDefaults** | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.ServiceDefaults/Extensions.cs` | Shared Aspire defaults (OpenTelemetry, health, service discovery) |

### Web startup flow (`Program.cs`)

```71:198:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Program.cs
var builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);

builder.AddServiceDefaults();
builder.Services.AddInfrastructure(builder.Configuration);
builder.Services.AddMunicipalDatabaseHealthCheck();
// ... Razor, MudBlazor, validators, handlers ...
var app = builder.Build();

await app.Services.InitializeDatabaseAsync();
// ... middleware ...
app.MapRazorComponents<App>().AddInteractiveServerRenderMode();
app.MapRegistrationEndpoints();
app.MapBirthDeclarationEndpoints();
app.MapChangeOfAddressEndpoints();
app.MapOpenApi();
app.UseHealthCheckApiKeyProtection();
app.MapDefaultEndpoints();
app.Run();
```

Notable middleware: **no** `UseAuthentication`/`UseAuthorization`. Uses antiforgery, static assets, exception handler (non-dev), status-code re-execution, OpenAPI, and health endpoints.

### Aspire AppHost

```1:11:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.AppHost/AppHost.cs
var builder = DistributedApplication.CreateBuilder(args);

var postgres = builder.AddPostgres("postgres")
    .WithDataVolume()
    .AddDatabase("schaerbeek");

builder.AddProject<Projects.SchaerbeekMunicipality_Web>("web")
    .WithReference(postgres)
    .WaitFor(postgres);

builder.Build().Run();
```

Aspire injects the `ConnectionStrings:schaerbeek` value into the Web project at runtime when launched via AppHost.

### ServiceDefaults (`AddServiceDefaults`)

Registered from Web via `builder.AddServiceDefaults()`:

- OpenTelemetry (metrics/tracing; OTLP if `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT` is set)
- Default liveness health check (`/alive`)
- Service discovery + standard HTTP resilience on `HttpClient`
- `MapDefaultEndpoints()` â†’ `/health` (readiness) and `/alive` (liveness)
- `UseHealthCheckApiKeyProtection()` â†’ non-dev protection via `HEALTH_CHECK_API_KEY` header `X-Health-Check-Key`

---

## Dependency injection

DI is split across **two registration sites** â€” no MediatR, no assembly scanning for handlers.

### 1. Infrastructure â€” `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/DependencyInjection.cs`

**DbContext** (SQLite or PostgreSQL based on connection string):

```31:45:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/DependencyInjection.cs
var connectionString = configuration.GetConnectionString("schaerbeek")
    ?? "Data Source=:memory:";

services.AddDbContext<MunicipalDbContext>(options =>
{
    if (IsSqlite(connectionString))
        options.UseSqlite(connectionString);
    else
        options.UseNpgsql(connectionString).UseSnakeCaseNamingConvention();
});
```

**Repositories** (all `AddScoped`):

| Interface | Implementation |
|-----------|----------------|
| `IRegistrationCaseRepository` | `RegistrationCaseRepository` |
| `IBirthDeclarationCaseRepository` | `BirthDeclarationCaseRepository` |
| `IChangeOfAddressCaseRepository` | `ChangeOfAddressCaseRepository` |
| `IPersonRepository` | `PersonRepository` |
| `IAdministrativeDocumentRepository` | `AdministrativeDocumentRepository` |
| `IResidencePermitRepository` | `ResidencePermitRepository` |
| `IHouseholdRepository` | `HouseholdRepository` |
| `IReferenceDataRepository` | `ReferenceDataRepository` |
| `INationalRegisterRepository` | `NationalRegisterRepository` |
| `IPoliceVerificationRepository` | `PoliceVerificationRepository` |
| `ICaseAuditRepository` | `CaseAuditRepository` |
| `ICertificateRequestRepository` | `CertificateRequestRepository` |
| `IOutboundNotificationRepository` | `OutboundNotificationRepository` |

**Other infrastructure services:**

| Lifetime | Service |
|----------|---------|
| Scoped | `IDomainEventDispatcher` â†’ `DomainEventDispatcher` |
| Scoped (multi) | `IRegistrationConfirmedHandler` â†’ logging + notification handlers |
| Scoped | `IBirthRegisteredHandler` â†’ `BirthRegisteredNotificationHandler` |
| Scoped | `IAddressChangedHandler` â†’ `AddressChangedNotificationHandler` |
| Singleton | `ICertificateRenderer` â†’ `HtmlCertificateRenderer` |
| Singleton | `IDocumentStorage` â†’ `LocalFileDocumentStorage` |
| Singleton | `IResidencePolicy` (4 policies) + `ResidencePolicyEvaluator` |

**Database init** (`InitializeDatabaseAsync`): SQLite â†’ `EnsureCreatedAsync`; PostgreSQL â†’ `MigrateAsync`; then seeds reference data and national register.

### 2. Web â€” `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Program.cs`

- `AddValidatorsFromAssemblyContaining<OpenRegistrationCaseValidator>()` (FluentValidation)
- `TimeProvider.System` (singleton)
- `IAppDialogService` â†’ `AppDialogService` (scoped)
- Per-feature **authorization/guard** classes (scoped)
- **~60+ handlers** registered individually with `AddScoped<...Handler>()`

Handlers are **not** auto-discovered; each must be added manually in `Program.cs`.

### How services are consumed

**A. Minimal API endpoints** â€” handler injected as endpoint parameter:

```36:42:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/AttachDocument/AttachDocumentEndpoint.cs
public static async Task<IResult> Handle(
    Guid id,
    IFormFile file,
    DocumentType documentType,
    AttachDocumentHandler handler,
    IValidator<AttachDocumentForm> validator,
    CancellationToken cancellationToken)
```

Endpoints are mapped in:
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/RegistrationEndpoints.cs`
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/BirthDeclaration/BirthDeclarationEndpoints.cs`
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/ChangeOfAddress/ChangeOfAddressEndpoints.cs`

**B. Blazor components/pages** â€” `@inject` handler classes directly, e.g.:

- `RegistrationCaseDetail.razor` â†’ `GetRegistrationCaseHandler`, `RecordIdentityHandler`, etc.
- `AddressStep.razor` â†’ `DeclareAddressHandler`, `SearchStreetsHandler`
- `MainLayout.razor` â†’ `ICurrentOfficer`, `IServiceScopeFactory` (for scoped background loads)

**C. Handlers** â€” constructor injection of repositories, guards, auth, storage:

```10:17:src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/AttachDocument/AttachDocumentHandler.cs
public sealed class AttachDocumentHandler(
    RegistrationCaseGuard caseGuard,
    IRegistrationCaseRepository caseRepository,
    IAdministrativeDocumentRepository documentRepository,
    IDocumentStorage documentStorage,
    RegistrationExceptionEvaluator exceptionEvaluator,
    ICurrentOfficer currentOfficer,
    TimeProvider timeProvider)
```

**D. Domain events** â€” confirm handlers inject `IDomainEventDispatcher`, which resolves multiple `IRegistrationConfirmedHandler` implementations via `GetServices<>()`:

`/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Events/DomainEventDispatcher.cs`

---

## Authentication / authorization

**No ASP.NET Core Authentication or Authorization** is configured â€” no cookies, JWT, Identity, `[Authorize]`, or auth middleware.

Instead, a **demo role system** is used:

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Auth/ICurrentOfficer.cs` | Abstraction for current officer |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Auth/CurrentOfficer.cs` | Scoped in-memory state (officer ID, role, display name) |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Auth/OfficerRole.cs` | `ReceptionOfficer`, `PopulationOfficer`, `PoliceClerk` |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Auth/DemoOfficer.cs` | Static demo officers |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Auth/Components/RoleSwitcher.razor` | UI to switch demo officer |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Auth/DemoOfficerPersistence.cs` | Optional `?demoOfficer=<guid>` query param |

Registration in `Program.cs`:

```csharp
builder.Services.AddScoped<ICurrentOfficer, CurrentOfficer>();
builder.Services.AddScoped<RegistrationCaseAuthorization>();
builder.Services.AddScoped<RegistrationCaseGuard>();
// Same pattern for BirthDeclaration and ChangeOfAddress
```

**Authorization pattern** per feature area:

- `*CaseAuthorization` â€” role checks (`CanEditCase`, `EnsureCanCreate`, etc.) throwing `UnauthorizedAccessException`
- `*CaseGuard` â€” loads case from repository + calls authorization before edit/view

Example: `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/RegistrationCaseAuthorization.cs`

UI also gates navigation by role in `MainLayout.razor` via `CurrentOfficer.Role`.

---

## External services configuration

| Config | Source | Usage |
|--------|--------|-------|
| `ConnectionStrings:schaerbeek` | `appsettings.Production.json` â†’ SQLite path; Aspire AppHost â†’ PostgreSQL | DbContext provider selection |
| `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT` | Environment | Optional OpenTelemetry export |
| `HEALTH_CHECK_API_KEY` | Environment | Protects `/health` and `/alive` in non-dev |
| `ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT` | `launchSettings.json` | Development vs Production behavior |

Config files:
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/appsettings.json` â€” logging only
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/appsettings.Development.json` â€” logging only
- `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/appsettings.Production.json` â€” SQLite connection string

**No real external HTTP APIs** are registered (no `AddHttpClient` for third-party services). National register, police, tax/social-security notifications are **simulated in-process** via repositories and domain-event handlers that write to `OutboundNotifications`.

Design-time EF migrations use a hardcoded PostgreSQL connection in:
`/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/MunicipalDbContextFactory.cs`

Integration tests override DbContext to in-memory SQLite via:
`/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/MunicipalAppFactory.cs`

---

## Infrastructure layer

### DbContext

`/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/MunicipalDbContext.cs`

DbSets: `RegistrationCases`, `BirthDeclarationCases`, `ChangeOfAddressCases`, `Persons`, `AdministrativeDocuments`, `ResidencePermits`, `Households`, `HouseholdMembers`, `Municipalities`, `Streets`, `NationalRegisterPersons`, `PoliceVerificationRequests`, `CaseAuditEntries`, `CertificateRequests`, `OutboundNotifications`.

Entity configs applied from the Infrastructure assembly via `ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly`.

### Repositories

All under `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories/` â€” internal classes taking `MunicipalDbContext` via primary constructor. Typical pattern: query DbSet, `AddAsync`, `SaveChangesAsync` delegates to context.

Example: `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories/RegistrationCaseRepository.cs`

### File storage

**Interface:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Documents/IDocumentStorage.cs`

**Implementation:** `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Storage/LocalFileDocumentStorage.cs`

- Registered as **singleton** in `DependencyInjection.cs`
- Stores files under `{ContentRootPath}/uploads/` with GUID-prefixed filenames
- Computes SHA-256 hash on save
- Used by attach/download/remove handlers in Registration, BirthDeclaration, and ChangeOfAddress features

### Other infrastructure

| Path | Role |
|------|------|
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/HealthCheckExtensions.cs` | EF Core DbContext health check (`database`, tag `ready`) |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Certificates/HtmlCertificateRenderer.cs` | HTML certificate generation |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Events/*` | Domain event dispatch + outbound notification recording |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/ReferenceDataSeeder.cs` | Startup seed data |
| `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/NationalRegisterSeeder.cs` | Demo national register seed |

---

## Architecture summary

```
AppHost (Aspire) â”€â”€â–ş PostgreSQL "schaerbeek"
       â”‚
       â””â”€â”€â–ş Web Program.cs
              â”śâ”€â”€ AddServiceDefaults()     â†’ telemetry, health, service discovery
              â”śâ”€â”€ AddInfrastructure()      â†’ DbContext, repos, storage, events
              â”śâ”€â”€ AddScoped handlers       â†’ feature use cases (manual list)
              â””â”€â”€ Map endpoints + Blazor   â†’ handlers resolved per request/circuit

Auth: ICurrentOfficer (demo) + *Authorization/*Guard (application-level)
Storage: LocalFileDocumentStorage â†’ ./uploads/
DB: SQLite (dev/prod file) or PostgreSQL (Aspire)
```

If you want, I can also map a specific handler end-to-end (e.g. confirm registration â†’ domain event â†’ outbound notifications) or list every handler registered in `Program.cs`.
